milestoneTitle: Phase M9.17b.c — Shrunk tap target for Learn items. The whole card was an anchor/button which made accidental opens easy on phones. Now only the .learn-item-head (kind pill + title + state pill) is the link — <a> for courses/drafts-with-url, <button> for lessons. Meta, summary, and coverage become passive siblings that do nothing when tapped. The outer .learn-item stays as a plain <div> carrying the card chrome. wireLearnRowGestures keeps swipe-left-mastery on the card container; its capture-phase click-suppression still blocks the head-link's default when a swipe was handled. Lesson click handler rebinds to .learn-item-head inside lesson rows. 48px tap-target height via 6px vertical padding on the head (Apple 44px minimum with comfort margin).
